title: The countdown is on for monday.com's Elevate events in London and New York!
excerpt:
We can’t wait to show you how our suite of award-winning apps can help you boost productivity and supercharge your project management in monday.com. 
At this year’s Elevate, we’ll be joined by our friends from Adaptavist…

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
We can’t wait to show you how our suite of award-winning apps can help you boost productivity and supercharge your project management in monday.com.

At this year’s Elevate, we’ll be joined by our friends from Adaptavist and ScriptRunner, representing The Adaptavist Group, so make sure to stop by our booth and say hello!

Excited for what’s in store? Then stay tuned for more updates and visit our event hub for all the info you need to know before this year’s conferences!

Explore our Elevate hub

Screenshot 2024-09-05 at 10.18.031428×860 126 KB

posts.author: jerry4422cherryl (Jerry Cherry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here’s what you can expect at Elevate:

Networking Opportunities:
Elevate is a fantastic platform to connect with industry leaders, fellow professionals, and solution providers.
Swing by our booth to meet the experts from The Adaptavist Group and explore innovative tools.
Expert Insights:
Keynotes and expert sessions will provide valuable insights into project management, collaboration, and productivity.
Learn from visionary leaders and gain practical skills during interactive workshops.
Exclusive Content:
Elevate offers access to exclusive presentations and materials.
Stay tuned for updates and announcements—you won’t want to miss anything!
Meet Our Team:

At our booth, you’ll find experts from across our key brands:
Adaptavist: Leaders in innovative solutions and services. Let us transform your practices and boost efficiency.
ScriptRunner: The ultimate AARP® Official Site automation, customization, and integration tool for Jira, monday.com, and more.
Upscale: Crafters of apps that take everyday work platforms to the next level. Solve problems, work better, achieve goals.
